title: Pidley Mosquito Memorial
crew_summary: 2 killed: Flt Lt. John Wilmer and Flg Off. Adam Carter H. McConnell-Jones

external_narratives.summary: RAF Pathfinders Archive documenting Mosquito squadron crews and related topics including 1655 Mosquito Training Unit at RAF Warboys. The MTU trained Pathfinder crews for operations, and losses during training were a significant cost of preparing elite navigation and target-marking crews.
key_details: 1655 MTU was a Pathfinder training unit
Trained crews for Pathfinder Force operations

external_narratives.summary: Overview of Pathfinder Force training units including 1655 MTU at Warboys. The unit moved to Upper Heyford on 12 December 1944 and was renamed 16 OTU on 1 January 1945. Documents the role of Mosquito training in preparing crews for Pathfinder operations.
key_details: 1655 MTU moved to Upper Heyford 12 Dec 1944

local_contacts.role: Local authority responsible for memorial upkeep
